productDisplayName: Baggit Women Purple Goofy Jhuti Wallet
description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit and drop it into your messy hold-all. This two-fold piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag.Product DetailsPurple leatherette with a two-fold open style, has stitch detailing on the upper with weave designConcealed magnetic closuresTen card holders, one photo id card holder, three insert pockets and one compartment with a zippered separator on the centre foldA zippered pocket on the backMaterial and CareLeatherette, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeLength: 12 cmsWidth: 22 cms
